name: @art_is_code/activeclass_js
description: A lightweight, tag-based JavaScript utility for handling navigation active states with AJAX support.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp src/activeclass_js.js dist/activeclass_js.js && terser src/activeclass_js.js -o dist/activeclass_js.min.js --compress --mangle

author: Andrea D'Agostino (art is code)
